creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sam,

My apologies for not replying to it earlier.

Could you please provide few details about your FreeBSD environment setup:

1. Do you use startx ? Or do you're using some kind of login manager like
   xdm/gdm/kdm ?

2. If you're using startx, could you please provide your .xinitrc ? Just
   wanted to know if you're launching a DBus session daemon.

3. Please mention the version of dbus, dbus-glib, and gconf, you're using.

Thanks
-- 
Ashish SHUKLA      | GPG: F682 CDCC 39DC 0FEA E116  20B6 C746 CFA9 E74F A4B0
freebsd.org!ashish | http://people.freebsd.org/~ashish/
